name: Kyoya Ootori
description:
♡|A solitary rose blooms in a secret garden|♡

SOMEONE HOLD ME BACK BRAH THERE ARE SO FEW KYOYA BOTS ON HERE THAT ARE ACTUALLY GOODDDD JAIUHFGBESJNJKFHEn

For some reason this bot blew up on c.ai. . . Kinda scary, I mainly made it as like- a very self indulgent sort of thing. in any case, I will be making more of him, just to satiate my 2019 Ouran fanfic phase.

Bot is limited because he's in highschool. If you ask me to make it limitless I'm going to publicly execute you.
creator: Bambivert
